task_description: Fix the intruder hidden-guess flow to include hidden-item-card selection, add sound effects (wrong guess, win, lose), replace bottom notifications with floating top overlays, and add shake animation on wrong guess.

verification.summary: assembleDebug BUILD SUCCESSFUL. No unit tests specific to this feature (existing pattern in this project). Verified: model updated with hidden_item_id, ViewModel has correct flow methods, Screen has HiddenItemGridDialog and ItemSelectionDialogWithGreyed, SoundManager created, floating notification replaces bottom text, shake animation on wrong guess.
